subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness to thy turning and devoted orientation towards God, the Lord of all mankind. This is a testimony that endureth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد القلم الاعلی بتوجهک و اقبالک الی الله مولی الوری هذه شهاده تمشی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
